mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in retail sales signals resilient household demand and near-term revenue growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days when RSAFS growth is above its trailing trend.
evidence_refs: fact:latest RSAFS snapshot value was 718867 as of one month before 2024-11-15
failure_condition: Reject if positive RSAFS 3-month momentum does not produce higher average 20-day S&P 500 returns than negative momentum in walk-forward tests, or if the 3-year rolling hit-rate stays below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate crossing above a restrictive threshold raises equity discount rates and tightens financing conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above 4.5% or remains above 4.5% after being below that level within the prior 6 months
evidence_refs: fact:latest FEDFUNDS snapshot value was 4.83 as of one month before 2024-11-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or if their mean return exceeds the unconditional mean by at least 25 basis points.

mechanism_narrative: A rising unemployment rate combined with slowing payroll growth identifies labor-market deterioration that reduces expected earnings, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months and PAYEMS 3-month growth falls below its 12-month average
evidence_refs: fact:latest UNRATE snapshot value was 4.1 as of one month before 2024-11-15
fact:latest PAYEMS snapshot value was 159005 as of one month before 2024-11-15
failure_condition: Reject if the joint trigger is followed by above-median 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of walk-forward instances or if the interaction term is not negative in out-of-sample regressions.

mechanism_narrative: Positive industrial production momentum signals improving output and operating leverage for cyclical firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:latest INDPRO snapshot value was 102.2805 as of one month before 2024-11-15
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month INDPRO momentum has a non-positive out-of-sample coefficient for 20-day S&P 500 returns across two consecutive 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A housing starts breakdown signals weakening rate-sensitive demand and future construction-linked earnings pressure, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses more than 5% below its trailing 12-month moving average
evidence_refs: fact:latest HOUST snapshot value was 1354.0 as of two months before 2024-11-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered housing-starts breakdowns are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if mean triggered returns exceed unconditional returns.

mechanism_narrative: Falling CPI momentum while the policy rate remains restrictive signals disinflation without immediate recession, lowering expected discount-rate pressure and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth falls below its 12-month growth rate while FEDFUNDS is above 4.0%
evidence_refs: fact:latest CPIAUCSL snapshot value was 315.454 as of one month before 2024-11-15
fact:latest FEDFUNDS snapshot value was 4.83 as of one month before 2024-11-15
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL and FEDFUNDS joint trigger has a negative average 20-day S&P 500 return out of sample or if its hit-rate is below the unconditional positive-return frequency.

mechanism_narrative: Stable low unemployment with continuing payroll expansion signals durable income growth and contained recession risk, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE is at or below 4.2% and PAYEMS is above its level 3 months earlier
evidence_refs: fact:latest UNRATE snapshot value was 4.1 as of one month before 2024-11-15
failure_condition: Reject if the joint low-unemployment and payroll-expansion condition fails to deliver positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in at least 52% of walk-forward instances.

mechanism_narrative: Strong real GDP growth during restrictive policy shifts the equity reaction from growth optimism to higher-for-longer rate risk, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter annualized growth exceeds 2.5% while FEDFUNDS is above 4.5%
evidence_refs: fact:latest GDPC1 snapshot value was 23386.248 as of four months before 2024-11-15
fact:latest FEDFUNDS snapshot value was 4.83 as of one month before 2024-11-15
failure_condition: Reject if the GDPC1 and FEDFUNDS interaction trigger is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or if the interaction coefficient is positive out of sample.
